title: Poppyseed Cake
ingredients: 1 ½ tsp. butter flavoring or emulsion
1/3 c. orange juice concentrate (from the can)
½ tsp butter flavoring or emulsion
instructions: In a medium size bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a large bowl, mix together sugar, milk, oil, eggs, poppyseeds, vanilla, butter flavoring, and almond flavoring until well combined.
Add dry ingredients to wet ingredients until fully mixed.
Pour into 2 loaf pans or 1 tube pan, greased and floured.
Remove from oven and let cool for approximately 20-30 minutes.
While cake is still very warm, poke holes on top with a fork.
In a small saucepan, combine sugar, butter, orange juice concentrate, vanilla, butter flavoring, and almond flavoring for the glaze.
Heat glaze until sugar melts thoroughly and mix until smooth and well combined.
Drizzle or spoon glaze over cake.
Let cool completely while glaze soaks into cake.
notes: This recipe was given by the author's nurse preceptor during senior year of nursing school at University of Arizona.
The recipe has a special memory attached—the author was working on a cardiac unit and successfully performed CPR on a patient in full cardiac arrest who survived.
Omit almond flavoring if making for Grant.
